# bool / storage

The **bool** type's storage capability: contributes `Fields.Storage` (server
runtime) mapping the `bool` field token to a Postgres `boolean` column via
`build(name) => boolean(name)`. Resolved by exact token through
`resolveFieldStorage("bool")`.
